pi_items.source: Decompiled Sygic APK res/xml/settings_language_and_voice.xml and res/values/strings.xml

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Sygic GPS Navigation Android app (com.sygic.aura) without a specific dataset. The target language to select is explicitly defined as 'Deutsch' (or 'German') in the task description. The verifier enforces an anti-gaming check by verifying that files in the app's shared_prefs directory were modified. The claimed expected setting key 'voice' is contradicted by the decompiled APK resources; the actual SharedPreferences key for the voice setting in the Sygic app is 'preferenceKey_voice_selectedVoiceName'.
